meta.notes: Fresh session on pika-media-env. Agent hit DNS resolution error on first search attempt, spent significant LLM time debugging (reading script, testing curl, retrying). Actual skill execution was only ~4.8s but LLM overhead was 80%. 12 tool calls total due to debugging.

test_input.name: bohemian rhapsody queen
test_input.description: Apple Music search query for Bohemian Rhapsody by Queen

task.name: apple-music-reference
task.purpose: Search Apple Music and download 30s preview of Bohemian Rhapsody
task.expected_output: 30-second M4A preview of Bohemian Rhapsody by Queen

install.notes: Skills pre-loaded. Dependencies pre-installed in environment.

asset_acquisition.notes: No video download — this is a search+preview skill.

steps.name: search_apple_music
steps.notes: First search attempt hit DNS error. Agent retried — successful search in 1150ms.

steps.name: debug_dns_resolution
steps.notes: Agent read script source, tested curl connectivity, tried alternative approaches. DNS resolved on retry.

execution.notes: Actual skill execution ~4.8s. Agent spent most time debugging DNS error and reading script. 12 LLM calls due to error recovery.

delivery.notes: CDN upload in 1.7s actual. Preview is 962KB M4A, 30 seconds.
